channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Jungle Sees The ‘Sunshine’ On New Album
item.description: Bask in the groovy vibes ☀️ Jungle brings the 'Sunshine' with their latest album! Let's dance our way through this musical journey! 💃🎶 #Jungle #Sunshine

item.title: Mon Laferte Will Bring Noir Sound to North America with “Femme Fatale Tour”
item.description: 🌹 Get ready to be seduced by @monlaferte's mysterious sound on her "Femme Fatale Tour" in North America! Dates coming soon! 🌙 #MonLaferte #FemmeFataleTour

item.title: Fruit Bats announce new LP ‘The Landfill’ & tour, share title track
item.description: 🚀 Dive into the dreamy world of @FruitBatsMusic with their fresh LP 'The Landfill' and catch them on tour! 🎶🦇 #NewMusic #TourLife

item.title: Mumford & Sons, the Strokes Lead Sea.Hear.Now Festival 2026 Lineup
item.description: 🎶 Surf's up! 🏄‍♂️ Mumford & Sons, The Strokes, and more making waves at Sea.Hear.Now Festival 2026! 🎉 #LiveMusicVibes

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal announce ‘Death by Sexy’ 20th anniversary tour (BV Presale for NYC)
item.description: Get your groove on with Eagles of Death Metal on their ‘Death by Sexy’ tour! 🎸🔥 Snag your tickets for the NYC show now! #EODM #RockOn
